runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Go", "build_system": "go", "package_manager": "Go modules (implicit)", "build_commands": [". /tmp/versions.env && git clone $OP_NODE_REPO --branch $OP_NODE_TAG --single-branch . && git switch -c branch-$OP_NODE_TAG && bash -c '[ \"$(git rev-parse HEAD)\" = \"$OP_NODE_COMMIT\" ]'", ". /tmp/versions.env && cd op-node && make VERSION=$OP_NODE_TAG op-node", ". /tmp/versions.env && git clone $OP_GETH_REPO --branch $OP_GETH_TAG --single-branch . && git switch -c branch-$OP_GETH_TAG && bash -c '[ \"$(git rev-parse HEAD)\" = \"$OP_GETH_COMMIT\" ]'", "go run build/ci.go install -static ./cmd/geth"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y jq curl supervisor"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "1.24", "system_packages": ["jq", "curl", "supervisor"]}, "repo_type": "monorepo", "base_image": "ubuntu:24.04", "base_image_rationale": "Final runtime in the provided Dockerfiles uses Ubuntu 24.04 with jq, curl and supervisor for process management.", "pitfalls": ["OP_NODE_REPO, OP_NODE_TAG, OP_NODE_COMMIT, OP_GETH_REPO, OP_GETH_TAG, OP_GETH_COMMIT must be defined in versions.env and consistent with remote HEAD.", "The build relies on building op-node with make and then compiling geth, which assumes Go toolchain is present (golang:1.24).", "This blueprint focuses on the geth client path; other clients in the repo (nethermind, reth) require different toolchains and are not covered here.", "The final image expects supervisord to run as PID 1; ensure any runtime services and entrypoints align with that."], "notes": "This blueprint targets the geth client path (geth/Dockerfile) and describes the multi-stage build that produces op-node and geth binaries copied into an Ubuntu-based runtime image alongside supervisord."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM golang:1.24 AS op

RUN curl -sSfL 'https://just.systems/install.sh' | bash -s -- --to /usr/local/bin

WORKDIR /app

COPY versions.env /tmp/versions.env

RUN . /tmp/versions.env && git clone $OP_NODE_REPO --branch $OP_NODE_TAG --single-branch . && \
    git switch -c branch-$OP_NODE_TAG && \
    bash -c '[ "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" = "$OP_NODE_COMMIT" ]'

RUN . /tmp/versions.env && cd op-node && \
    make VERSION=$OP_NODE_TAG op-node

FROM golang:1.24 AS geth

WORKDIR /app

COPY versions.env /tmp/versions.env

RUN . /tmp/versions.env && git clone $OP_GETH_REPO --branch $OP_GETH_TAG --single-branch . && \
    git switch -c branch-$OP_GETH_TAG && \
    bash -c '[ "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" = "$OP_GETH_COMMIT" ]'

RUN go run build/ci.go install -static ./cmd/geth

FROM ubuntu:24.04

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y jq curl supervisor && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=op /app/op-node/bin/op-node /usr/local/bin/op-node
COPY --from=geth /app/build/bin/geth /usr/local/bin/geth

# Ensure binaries are executable
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/op-node /usr/local/bin/geth

COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
COPY geth/geth-entrypoint ./execution-entrypoint
COPY op-node-entrypoint .

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord"]

    git switch -c branch-$OP_GETH_TAG && \
    bash -c '[ "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" = "$OP_GETH_COMMIT" ]'

RUN go run build/ci.go install -static ./cmd/geth

FROM ubuntu:24.04

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y jq curl supervisor && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=op /app/op-node/bin/op-node ./
COPY --from=geth /app/build/bin/geth ./
COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
COPY geth/geth-entrypoint ./execution-entrypoint
COPY op-node-entrypoint .

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord"]
"}

FROM golang:1.24 AS op

RUN curl -sSfL 'https://just.systems/install.sh' | bash -s -- --to /usr/local/bin

WORKDIR /app

COPY versions.env /tmp/versions.env

RUN . /tmp/versions.env && git clone $OP_NODE_REPO --branch $OP_NODE_TAG --single-branch . && \
    git switch -c branch-$OP_NODE_TAG && \
    bash -c '[ "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" = "$OP_NODE_COMMIT" ]'

RUN . /tmp/versions.env && cd op-node && \
    make VERSION=$OP_NODE_TAG op-node

FROM golang:1.24 AS geth

WORKDIR /app

COPY versions.env /tmp/versions.env

RUN . /tmp/versions.env && git clone $OP_GETH_REPO --branch $OP_GETH_TAG --single-branch . && \
    git switch -c branch-$OP_GETH_TAG && \
    bash -c '[ "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" = "$OP_GETH_COMMIT" ]'

RUN go run build/ci.go install -static ./cmd/geth

FROM ubuntu:24.04

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y jq curl supervisor && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=op /app/op-node/bin/op-node /usr/local/bin/op-node
COPY --from=geth /app/build/bin/geth /usr/local/bin/geth

# Ensure binaries are executable

COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
COPY geth/geth-entrypoint ./execution-entrypoint
COPY op-node-entrypoint .

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord"]
